meaning: v.把(计划,稿件等)最后定下来,定案
examples: The prime minister is holding consultations with his colleagues to finalize the deal.
NATO and Russia are reporting some progress in efforts to finalize a charter governing their post-Cold War relationship.
They met to finalize the terms of the treaty.
Amum called on his counterpart to come back to the table to finalize the agreement.
This December, in Copenhagen, Governments will meet to finalize a new climate change agreement.
